mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT p.permission_code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT DISTINCT p.id AS id, p.parent_id AS parentId, p.permission_name AS permissionName, p.path AS path, p.icon AS icon, p.sort AS sort, p.permission_code AS permissionCode FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted = 0 AND (p.status IS NULL OR p.status = 1) AND LOWER(TRIM(IFNULL(p.permission_type, ''))) = 'menu' AND p.path IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(p.path) <> '' AND TRIM(p.path) NOT LIKE '/api/%' ORDER BY p.sort ASC, p.id ASC
